candidate_purpose: Author a sealed Tier-N specification for a single-instrument MNQ.c.0 fresh-candidate research diagnostic using the Connors RSI(2) bi-directional mean-reversion mechanic (F3). Selected per selection-plan revision after s12-d1 park (0e3f9d4; T1 at 41/50). The only track that clears K9 at BOTH IS AND OOS under the new K9-reachability discipline. Tests whether RSI(2) bi-directional on single-instrument MNQ.c.0 futures produces a structurally different result from the s9 long-only ETF-proxy falsification. Research diagnostic only. No promotion. No live trading. No FRC. No profitability claim.

cost_assumptions_locked_at_seal.start_cash_usd_revision_rationale: DA4=C revises START_CASH from default $100,000 (carried byte-equivalent from s12-d1 DA4=B) to $200,000 -- doubling the capital base. With per-trade risk pct fixed at 0.5% (DA3=B), the absolute risk per trade is $1,000 (vs $1,000 at s12-d1 baseline; same absolute risk but on doubled capital base). Crucially, this HALVES the per-dollar commission/slippage pressure: total round-trip cost ($2.10/contract) as a fraction of $200k cash is half what it is on $100k cash. This is the most aggressive DR10 mitigation lever available without modifying DR10 thresholds (which is forbidden per no_dr_redefinition_post_seal).
cost_assumptions_locked_at_seal.warmup_days_formula: MAX(longest_lookback_in_mechanic, 220); longest s13-d1 lookback is ATR(20) so floor at 220

DA14.notes: LOCKED non-negotiable per no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; mitigated via DA4=C $200k START_CASH

DA3.notes: REVISED FROM DRAFT DEFAULT 1.0% to 0.5% for DR3 risk mitigation (s9 RSI lineage cost-erosion precedent)

DA4.notes: REVISED FROM DRAFT DEFAULT $100k to $200k for DR10 risk mitigation (RSI high-frequency turnover); halves per-dollar cost pressure

entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.contract_multiplier_description: MNQ: $2 * Nasdaq-100 index value per point
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.mechanic_family_lock_origin: LOCKED at PLAN (commit 5e57984); DRAFT did NOT reopen mechanic-family menu
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.per_trade_risk_pct_revision_rationale: DA3=B revises per-trade risk from default 1.0% (carried byte-equivalent from s12-d1) to 0.5%, halving per-trade cost-drag intensity. This mitigates DR3 risk (zero-cost-only survival) inherited from the s9 RSI-2 ETF-proxy falsification precedent. RSI mean-reversion mechanics historically show S0-positive but S1+ cost-erosion; lower per-trade risk reduces the absolute cost-drag per trade and provides a structural cushion against DR3 fire under cost-stress sweep.
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.position_sizing_formula: contracts = floor((per_trade_risk_pct * equity) / (ATR_entry * tick_value_usd)) with per_trade_risk_pct = 0.005
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.roll_method: Databento native continuous-front-month synthesis (stype_in=continuous); vendor-side; byte-equivalent from s12-d1 chain
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.rsi_method: Connors RSI(2) using Wilder smoothing on close-to-close returns
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.rsi_thresholds_lock_origin: LOCKED at PLAN (10/50/90/50); DRAFT did NOT reopen; threshold modification post-SEAL FORBIDDEN per RF13
entry_exit_logic_boundary_locked_at_seal.stop_method: 2 * Wilder ATR(20) below entry (long) or above entry (short); set at entry; trail/lock byte-equivalent to s12-d1 chain

mechanic_family.reason: structurally orthogonal mechanic family; s12-d1 falsification does not transfer

per_trade_risk_pct.reason: DA3=B revised at SEAL; mitigates DR3 risk from s9 RSI lineage

start_cash_usd.reason: doubled cash base; halves per-dollar cost pressure; most aggressive DR10 mitigation

k9_and_oos_confirmation_rules.oos_confirmation_definition: OOS is CONFIRMED only iff ALL of: (a) C7 verdict is READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST, (b) OOS closed_trades >= 100, (c) OOS sharpe > 0, (d) OOS expectancy > 0, (e) OOS trade_curve_maxdd_pct >= -30% (equivalently |trade_curve_maxdd_pct| <= 30%; i.e., the realized OOS drawdown shall not exceed 30% in magnitude), (f) all safety counters zero, (g) no-pyramid invariant held, (h) starting_cash invariant held.
k9_and_oos_confirmation_rules.oos_indeterminate_definition: K9 fires (closed_trades < 100) AND no safety counter fires AND headline metrics positive; NOT a confirmation
k9_and_oos_confirmation_rules.oos_killed_definition: any safety K-gate fires OR any performance K-gate fires on OOS

k9_reachability_discipline_applied_at_se.framework_requirement: Every Tier-N spec PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL shall include an explicit K9-reachability table for BOTH IS and OOS windows

parent_references.s9_rsi2_etf_proxy_status: PARKED_SAFE_BUT_NOT_MONEY_PROVEN (S0 net PnL -$1211 over 414 trades on SPY/TLT/GLD/USO long-only ETF basket)

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure.disclosure_verbatim: OOS K9 reachable at lower bound with thin margin (~50-65 trades/year vs 50/year floor). If observed IS rate falls below 25/year on RSI(2) bi-directional, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable. The s9 RSI-2 baseline observed 414 trades over long-only 4-ETF window; if MNQ.c.0 bi-directional rate falls below half that proportional rate, OOS K9 fires. If OOS K9 fires, the OOS verdict shall be OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at 23c7164 and s12-d1 P11 park at ecbd001. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS; the appropriate response is to seal the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / INDETERMINATE verdict and park the candidate. Pursuing s13-d1 accepts the structural possibility of an OOS PARK outcome if the IS rate falls below the DRAFT-estimated 50-65/y band.

rejection_rules.dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5

dr_rules.DR10: turnover_cost_explosion annual_turnover>0.50 OR S2_cost_drag>0.05 byte-equivalent (DA14=A) -> REJECT_FAST; ELEVATED prior probability vs s11-d1 v1 and s12-d1 (RSI 50-65 trades/y is 5-10x higher turnover); DA4=C mitigates via 2x capital base
dr_rules.DR3: zero_cost_only_survival (S0>0 AND all S1..S4<=0) -> REJECT_FAST -- HIGHER_PRIOR_PROBABILITY for s13-d1 RSI lineage; DA3=B mitigates
dr_rules.DR5: cost_stress_turns_edge_negative tier flip -> REJECT_FAST or INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD carveout; BINDING for high-frequency

rejection_rules.k_gate_firing_priority_order: K8 > K12 > K7 > K9 > K1/K2/K4 > A-gates > ELIGIBLE_FOR_OOS

k_gates.K12_DR_fires_on_cost_stress: if any DR2/DR3/DR4/DR5 fires across S0/S2/S3/S4 cost-stress sweep at P6.5-equivalent -> FAIL_SAFETY (MORE LIKELY for s13-d1 given RSI lineage risk)
k_gates.K7_correlation_or_filter_silently_introd: if any filter/regime/correlation gate is introduced post-SEAL -> FAIL_SAFETY
k_gates.K8_sealed_parent_drift: if any sealed parent seal does not match the embedded constant -> FAIL_SAFETY

reject_fast_criteria_RF1_through_RF16: RF1: any DR rule fires REJECT_FAST (DR3 + DR5 + DR10 ELEVATED for s13-d1)
RF3: DR6 post-warmup invalid-sizing event count > 0
RF4: any forbidden-verdict-token in runner output
RF5: runner attempts SetLiveMode/SetBrokerageModel/DeployAlgorithm or unauthorized network/Databento call at runtime
RF6: any order-submit attempt while in warmup window
RF7: runner mutates any s11-d1/s12-d1/s10-d2/s10-d1/s9/s7-d1/B006_NNN/T8/s13-d1 sealed artifact (byte-shift)
RF8: runner makes a Databento API call at runtime
RF10: runner accesses DATABENTO_API_KEY at runtime
RF11: track silently re-introduces a filter/regime gate/selection rule
RF12: pyramid mechanism re-introduced in code
RF13: RSI thresholds silently switched from LOCKED 10/50/90/50 post-SEAL
RF14: universe widening or symbol substitution attempted at any phase
RF15: track depends on a survivorship-cherry-pick rule
RF16: any retroactive re-anchoring or modification of s12-d1 terminal park caused by this candidate

report_kind: S13-D1 Tier-N specification (sealed; binding; fresh candidate per selection-plan revision at 0e3f9d4; F3 RSI(2) bi-directional mean-reversion on MNQ.c.0; DA3=B per-trade risk 0.5% AND DA4=C START_CASH $200k revised at SEAL for DR3/DR10 mitigation; K9-reachability discipline + REC1-equivalent OOS disclosure carried byte-equivalent from PLAN/DRAFT)
s12_d1_lessons_inherited_explicitly: K9-reachability analysis MUST be performed at PLAN/DRAFT time with explicit IS AND OOS calculations (NEW framework discipline introduced at selection-plan revision 0e3f9d4)
Linear-scaling trade-count estimation from single-symbol multi-year baselines to other instruments is unreliable; the DRAFT estimate band should be conservatively wide
K9 inviolacy is structural; positive headline economics do NOT override K9 verdict semantics (LESSON_B006_002_002 reinforced)
DA4 (START_CASH) revision does NOT address K9 risk; sizing affects contracts-per-trade not trade-event frequency. K9 risk requires more SIGNALS, not more contracts-per-signal.
DR10 turnover risk should be calculated at PLAN/DRAFT time for high-frequency mechanics
P3 source files SHOULD remain byte-stable across P6 execution (simulator-in-tmp/ pattern preserves seal chain integrity)
REC1-equivalent OOS K9 disclosure should propagate across SEAL -> P1 -> P2 -> P3 -> P4 -> P6 -> P11 chain
Park is mandatory under C8 when K9 fires; no parameter iteration to seek better trade counts
seal_method: LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip (json.dumps sort_keys=True separators=',:' ensure_ascii=False default=str EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method)
why_rsi_2_bi_directional_fresh_candidate: s12-d1 Donchian-15/8 single-instrument K9-mitigation hypothesis was falsified at P6 IS (48 trades vs DRAFT 80-200; PARKED_SAFE_BUT_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE_AT_IS at ecbd001). Selection-plan revision after s12-d1 park (0e3f9d4) identified T1 (RSI(2) bi-directional on MNQ.c.0) as the only track scoring 41/50 that clears K9-reachability at BOTH IS and OOS. RSI(2) produces ~50-65 trades/year on MNQ.c.0 (5-6x s12-d1's observed 10/y), structurally crossing the K9 floor at both windows. s9 RSI-2 falsification on long-only SPY/TLT/GLD/USO does NOT transfer because (a) asset class differs, (b) cost surface differs, (c) signal direction differs (bi-directional vs long-only), (d) universe differs. Operator revised at SEAL: DA3=B (per-trade risk 0.5%) AND DA4=C (START_CASH $200k) -- combined revision is the most conservative DR3/DR10 posture mitigating both zero-cost-only-survival risk (DR3; s9 lineage) and turnover-cost-explosion risk (DR10; high-frequency).
